name: federal-register-mcp
description: MCP server for the Federal Register. Proposed rules, final rules, notices, executive orders, FAR cases, and regulatory tracking.
long_description:
Queries the Federal Register API for published proposed rules, final rules, notices, and executive orders since 1994. Includes comment period tracking, FAR case history, and full-text search across agency documents.

8 tools. No authentication required.

Hardened across 4 audit rounds with 77 regression tests. Roughly 30 items addressed including the pydantic crash and payload bomb cross-fixes applied across all 8 MCPs in this suite.
